findings.description: Duplicate clusterInventory: key — YAML will silently ignore the first occurrence; remove the spurious blank entry.
Extra } added after noCRDCacheTTL closing brace makes the JSON schema invalid — helm lint will fail.
Two commits titled 'Address Copilot review comments' are vague and must describe the actual change.
Commits 'backend: wire Cluster Inventory configuration' and 'cluster-inventory: show ClusterProfile health conditions' do not follow area: SubArea: Description format.
Date() returns a verbose human-readable string; use Date.now().toString() for a cleaner cache-buster.
No unit test for the auto-redirect useEffect; a Vitest test would prevent regressions.
'oidcAutoLogin' in action.payload guard prevents partial setConfig from resetting the flag.
OIDCAuth correctly branches on window.opener to separate popup and full-page redirect flows.
sessionStorage (not localStorage) for loop prevention correctly scopes to tab and clears on close.
